title: helichrysum cephalotes
intro: Helichrysum cephalotes, also known as the yellow paper flower or krantz azalea, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which contains compounds such as neryl acetate, borneol, and linalool, that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum cephalotes include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for treating conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues. Helichrysum cephalotes can be used in various herbal preparations, including essential oils, capsules, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
